args.query: SELECT business_ref, AVG(rating) as avg_rating, COUNT(*) as review_cnt FROM review WHERE date >= '2016-01-01' AND date <= '2016-06-30' GROUP BY business_ref HAVING COUNT(*) >= 5 ORDER BY avg_rating DESC LIMIT 5

exec_args.sql: SELECT business_ref, AVG(rating) as avg_rating, COUNT(*) as review_cnt FROM review WHERE date >= '2016-01-01' AND date <= '2016-06-30' GROUP BY business_ref HAVING COUNT(*) >= 5 ORDER BY avg_rating DESC LIMIT 5

args.code:
description = "Located at 501 Fairmount Ave in Philadelphia, PA, this inviting establishment offers a delightful menu featuring Restaurants, Breakfast & Brunch, American (New), Cafes, perfect for a cozy meal any time of the day."
start_marker = "featuring "
end_marker = ", perfect for"

try:
    start_idx = description.index(start_marker) + len(start_marker)
    end_idx = description.index(end_marker)
    categories = description[start_idx:end_idx]
except ValueError:
    categories = "Category information not found in description"

print("__RESULT__:")
print(f'"{categories}"')

result.preview: "The business with the highest average rating between January 1, 2016 and June 30, 2016 (considering only those with at least 5 reviews) is \"Coffee House Too Cafe\". It belongs to the following categories: Restaurants, Breakfast & Brunch, American (New), Cafes."

args.answer: The business with the highest average rating between January 1, 2016 and June 30, 2016 (considering only those with at least 5 reviews) is "Coffee House Too Cafe". It belongs to the following categories: Restaurants, Breakfast & Brunch, American (New), Cafes.
